ModMetaData.name: GrimWorld 40,000 - Dead Men
ModMetaData.author: Clashgore, Eridanus, Jerry The Cultist, BlackMarket420, Abomination, Shun The Witch, Sophia Orr
ModMetaData.description:
"In life, war. In death, peace. In life, shame. In death, atonement."

Fight with or against the Death Korps of Krieg, Imperial Guard Regiments raised from the world of Krieg. Notoriously grim and fatalistic warriors, they seek to atone for their planet's past rebellion by dying glorious deaths in service to the Imperium. For this purpose, Death Korps regiments routinely request to fight in the galaxy's deadliest warzones, grinding their enemy down through long battles of attrition and siege warfare.

This mod includes:
- Apparels
- Melee and ranged weapons
- Regimental faction

Dead Men is a mod within the "Regiments of Renown" mini-series, from GrimWorld 40,000.
